prompts.name: 0 — The Fool
prompts.meaning: New beginnings, innocence, spontaneity, a free spirit. Step into the unknown with open curiosity.

prompts.name: I — The Magician
prompts.meaning: Willpower, desire, creation, manifestation. You have all the tools you need — use them.

prompts.name: II — The High Priestess
prompts.meaning: Intuition, sacred knowledge, the subconscious. Trust what you know without being able to say why.

prompts.name: III — The Empress
prompts.meaning: Femininity, beauty, nature, abundance, nurturing. Tend to what is growing.

prompts.name: IV — The Emperor
prompts.meaning: Authority, structure, control, fatherhood. Build something solid and lasting.

prompts.name: V — The Hierophant
prompts.meaning: Tradition, conformity, morality, ethics. What institutions or beliefs are shaping your choices?

prompts.name: VI — The Lovers
prompts.meaning: Love, harmony, relationships, values, choices. What do you truly want?

prompts.name: VII — The Chariot
prompts.meaning: Control, willpower, success, determination. Push forward — victory comes through discipline.

prompts.name: VIII — Strength
prompts.meaning: Courage, patience, control, compassion. True strength is quiet and steady.

prompts.name: IX — The Hermit
prompts.meaning: Solitude, searching, guidance, introspection. Withdraw and listen to what's inside.

prompts.name: X — Wheel of Fortune
prompts.meaning: Luck, karma, life cycles, destiny. Everything turns. Where are you in the cycle?

prompts.name: XI — Justice
prompts.meaning: Fairness, truth, cause and effect. What is the honest reckoning here?

prompts.name: XII — The Hanged Man
prompts.meaning: Surrender, letting go, new perspectives, sacrifice. What happens if you stop struggling?

prompts.name: XIII — Death
prompts.meaning: Endings, beginnings, change, transformation. Something must end so something new can start.

prompts.name: XIV — Temperance
prompts.meaning: Balance, moderation, patience, purpose. Find the middle path.

prompts.name: XV — The Devil
prompts.meaning: Shadow self, attachment, addiction, restriction. What are you bound to that you could release?

prompts.name: XVI — The Tower
prompts.meaning: Disaster, upheaval, sudden change, revelation. What needs to fall so something true can stand?

prompts.name: XVII — The Star
prompts.meaning: Hope, faith, rejuvenation, serenity. You are being renewed.

prompts.name: XVIII — The Moon
prompts.meaning: Illusion, fear, the unconscious, confusion. Not everything is as it appears — look closer.

prompts.name: XIX — The Sun
prompts.meaning: Positivity, fun, warmth, success, vitality. Let yourself shine.

prompts.name: XX — Judgement
prompts.meaning: Reflection, reckoning, awakening, absolution. Answer the call.

prompts.name: XXI — The World
prompts.meaning: Completion, integration, accomplishment, travel. You have arrived — and the next journey begins.

prompts.name: Ace of Wands
prompts.meaning: Inspiration, new beginnings, growth, potential. A spark is here — catch it.

prompts.name: Two of Wands
prompts.meaning: Planning, future, progress, decisions. The world is open — choose your direction.

prompts.name: Three of Wands
prompts.meaning: Expansion, foresight, overseas opportunities. You've launched it — now watch it unfold.

prompts.name: Four of Wands
prompts.meaning: Celebration, harmony, marriage, home. Pause and appreciate what's been built.

prompts.name: Five of Wands
prompts.meaning: Conflict, disagreements, competition, tension. Friction can be generative — engage it.

prompts.name: Six of Wands
prompts.meaning: Victory, success, public reward, progress. Acknowledge how far you've come.

prompts.name: Seven of Wands
prompts.meaning: Perseverance, defensiveness, maintaining position. Hold your ground.

prompts.name: Eight of Wands
prompts.meaning: Speed, action, air travel, movement. Things are accelerating — keep up.

prompts.name: Nine of Wands
prompts.meaning: Resilience, courage, persistence, test of faith. Nearly there — don't give up now.

prompts.name: Ten of Wands
prompts.meaning: Burden, extra responsibility, hard work, completion. What could you put down?

prompts.name: Page of Wands
prompts.meaning: Enthusiasm, exploration, discovery, free spirit. Approach something with fresh eyes.

prompts.name: Knight of Wands
prompts.meaning: Energy, passion, adventure, impulsiveness. Act boldly, but don't lose the thread.

prompts.name: Queen of Wands
prompts.meaning: Courage, confidence, independence, determination. Own your presence.

prompts.name: King of Wands
prompts.meaning: Natural-born leader, vision, honour, entrepreneur. Lead with purpose.

prompts.name: Ace of Cups
prompts.meaning: Love, new relationships, compassion, creativity. The heart opens.

prompts.name: Two of Cups
prompts.meaning: Unity, partnership, mutual attraction. Two forces finding harmony.

prompts.name: Three of Cups
prompts.meaning: Celebration, friendship, creativity, community. Gather with people you love.

prompts.name: Four of Cups
prompts.meaning: Meditation, contemplation, apathy, reevaluation. What's being offered that you're not seeing?

prompts.name: Five of Cups
prompts.meaning: Regret, failure, disappointment, pessimism. Mourn what was lost, then turn to what remains.

prompts.name: Six of Cups
prompts.meaning: Revisiting the past, childhood memories, innocence, joy. What did you love before you learned to doubt?

prompts.name: Seven of Cups
prompts.meaning: Opportunities, choices, wishful thinking, illusion. Not all of these are real — discern carefully.

prompts.name: Eight of Cups
prompts.meaning: Disappointment, abandonment, withdrawal, escapism. Walking away can be wisdom, not failure.

prompts.name: Nine of Cups
prompts.meaning: Contentment, satisfaction, gratitude, wish come true. Let yourself enjoy this.

prompts.name: Ten of Cups
prompts.meaning: Harmony, marriage, alignment, happy families. What does flourishing actually look like for you?

prompts.name: Page of Cups
prompts.meaning: Creative opportunities, intuitive messages, curiosity. Stay open to the unexpected.

prompts.name: Knight of Cups
prompts.meaning: Creativity, romance, charm, imagination. Follow what calls to you.

prompts.name: Queen of Cups
prompts.meaning: Compassion, calm, comfort, intuition. Lead with feeling.

prompts.name: King of Cups
prompts.meaning: Emotional balance, generosity, control of feeling. Hold depth without being swept away.

prompts.name: Ace of Swords
prompts.meaning: Clarity, breakthroughs, new ideas, mental force. Cut through to the truth.

prompts.name: Two of Swords
prompts.meaning: Difficult decisions, weighing options, an impasse. What would you decide if you had to choose right now?

prompts.name: Three of Swords
prompts.meaning: Heartbreak, suffering, grief, sorrow. Let it hurt — then let it pass.

prompts.name: Four of Swords
prompts.meaning: Rest, restoration, contemplation, recuperation. Stop pushing. Rest is work.

prompts.name: Five of Swords
prompts.meaning: Conflict, defeat, win at all costs, betrayal. Is winning this worth the cost?

prompts.name: Six of Swords
prompts.meaning: Transition, leaving, moving on, travel. You're heading somewhere calmer.

prompts.name: Seven of Swords
prompts.meaning: Deception, trickery, tactics, resourcefulness. Are you being honest with yourself?

prompts.name: Eight of Swords
prompts.meaning: Restriction, confusion, powerlessness — but the blindfold is self-imposed. What would you do if you weren't afraid?

prompts.name: Nine of Swords
prompts.meaning: Anxiety, worry, fear, depression, nightmares. The thought is not the thing. Name what's scaring you.

prompts.name: Ten of Swords
prompts.meaning: Endings, loss, painful finality, deep wounds. It's over. That's also a beginning.

prompts.name: Page of Swords
prompts.meaning: New ideas, curiosity, thirst for knowledge. Ask the question you've been circling.

prompts.name: Knight of Swords
prompts.meaning: Ambition, action, driven, fast-thinking. Charge forward — but check your direction first.

prompts.name: Queen of Swords
prompts.meaning: Quick-thinking, organised, perceptive, independent. See clearly and speak plainly.

prompts.name: King of Swords
prompts.meaning: Mental clarity, intellectual authority, truth, ethics. Judge the situation on its merits.

prompts.name: Ace of Pentacles
prompts.meaning: New financial or material opportunity, prosperity, abundance. Something tangible is beginning.

prompts.name: Two of Pentacles
prompts.meaning: Multiple priorities, time management, prioritisation, adaptability. What actually matters most right now?

prompts.name: Three of Pentacles
prompts.meaning: Teamwork, collaboration, building, learning. Good work happens together.

prompts.name: Four of Pentacles
prompts.meaning: Conservation, security, frugality, control. What are you holding onto too tightly?

prompts.name: Five of Pentacles
prompts.meaning: Financial loss, poverty, insecurity, worry. Help is closer than it looks.

prompts.name: Six of Pentacles
prompts.meaning: Giving, receiving, sharing, generosity, charity. The flow goes both ways.

prompts.name: Seven of Pentacles
prompts.meaning: Long-term view, sustainable results, perseverance. Tend the thing that takes time.

prompts.name: Eight of Pentacles
prompts.meaning: Apprenticeship, skill development, diligence, mastery. Put in the hours.

prompts.name: Nine of Pentacles
prompts.meaning: Abundance, luxury, self-reliance, financial independence. You've earned this.

prompts.name: Ten of Pentacles
prompts.meaning: Wealth, financial security, family, long-term success. What are you building that lasts?

prompts.name: Page of Pentacles
prompts.meaning: Opportunity, ambition, diligence, manifestation. Start the thing you've been planning.

prompts.name: Knight of Pentacles
prompts.meaning: Efficiency, routine, conservatism, hard work. Slow and steady.

prompts.name: Queen of Pentacles
prompts.meaning: Practicality, creature comforts, financial security, nurturing. Take care of the material.

prompts.name: King of Pentacles
prompts.meaning: Wealth, business, leadership, security, discipline. Master the practical world.
